frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Bro if she just says no, half the time it's attitude only. But if she's already with someone, then leave it yaar, no point interfering in another guy's scene. That at least I can respect.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it treats the woman's own refusal as less valid than her attachment to another man. It encodes the surface manifestation of ignoring direct disinterest but backing off once she is understood to be 'taken,' framed as reasonable respect.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
